- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
One more thing — what does the battery warranty cover?

For the Aurelia Eterna, the high-voltage battery is covered for **8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first** (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage).

Aurelia also guarantees that the battery will retain at least **70% of its original usable capacity** during that warranty period. If it falls below that threshold, the battery will be **repaired or replaced at no charge**.

If you'd like, I can also summarise how this differs from the standard new vehicle warranty.

- (upload) 01-model-range: Aurelia Motors — Model Range Aurelia Motors hand-builds four luxury models. Every car is assembled at the Aurelia Atelier in Modena and personalised through the Aurelia Bespoke program. 1) Aurelia Stellare — Grand Tourer - 4.0L twin-turbo V8, 612 hp, 0-100 km/h in 3.4 s - 2+2 seating, full-grain Tuscan leather as standard - Ideal for long-distance touring in absolute comfort 2) Aurelia Vento — Roadster - 3.8L twin-turbo V8, 580 hp, retractable hardtop in 14 seconds - Two seats, lightweight carbon-fibre tub - The most driver-focused car in the range 3) Aurelia Soluna — Luxury SUV - 4.0L V8 mild-hybrid, 550 hp, adaptive air suspension - Five seats, optional rear "Executive Lounge" package - All-wheel drive with terrain modes 4) Aurelia Eterna — Electric Flagship Saloon - Dual-motor all-electric, 700 hp, 620 km WLTP range - 350 kW fast charging: 10-80% in about 22 minutes - Four seats with reclining rear thrones and a glass roof All models are limited production. Annual output is capped at 1,800 cars worldwide to preserve exclusivity.

[User question]
Excuse me, how many seats does the Aurelia Eterna have?
The Aurelia Eterna has **four seats**. It is described as offering **“four seats with reclining rear thrones and a glass roof”** (Aurelia Motors — Model Range).

- (upload) 05-ownership-faq: Aurelia Motors — Ownership Services & FAQ Aurelia Privilege membership - Every owner automatically receives Aurelia Privilege membership for the life of their ownership. - Benefits include 24/7 concierge, priority service booking, invitations to Aurelia driving events, and access to the owners' lounge at the Modena factory. Roadside assistance - Complimentary 24/7 roadside assistance is included for the duration of the warranty across the country and neighbouring regions. - If your car cannot be repaired the same day, Aurelia arranges alternative luxury transport so your plans are not interrupted. Charging the Aurelia Eterna - The Eterna supports 350 kW DC fast charging: roughly 10-80% in about 22 minutes under ideal conditions. - A home wall-box charger is included with every Eterna; professional installation can be arranged by Aurelia. - The car provides access to a network of premium public charging partners through the Aurelia Owner app. Test drives - Private test drives are arranged by appointment at an Aurelia Atelier. - For serious commissions, a multi-day "Extended Experience" drive can be arranged with a concierge. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. The Aurelia Owner app shows live build milestones and photos from the Atelier. - Q: Are Aurelia cars available outside Europe? A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.

[User question]
Good day. do you deliver outside Europe?

Good day — yes, Aurelia delivers outside Europe. The knowledge base states that “Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region” (Ownership Services & FAQ).

If you’d like, I can also help with delivery timing at a high level, or connect you with your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor for region-specific arrangements.

- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

[User question]
Hi, are software updates free for the Eterna?

Yes — for the Aurelia Eterna, over-the-air software updates are provided at no charge. Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year. (Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance)

If you'd like, I can also help with Eterna service intervals or how to arrange servicing through Aurelia.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
One more thing — how long is the corrosion warranty?

The corrosion warranty covers the **body structure against perforation from corrosion for 12 years**. (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage)

If you’d like, I can also summarise the full paint and body coverage for you.

Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

You can change your specification **up until the car enters the paint stage**. After that point, changes are no longer possible according to the ordering policy (**Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery**).

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Charging the Aurelia Eterna - The Eterna supports 350 kW DC fast charging: roughly 10-80% in about 22 minutes under ideal conditions. - A home wall-box charger is included with every Eterna; professional installation can be arranged by Aurelia. - The car provides access to a network of premium public charging partners through the Aurelia Owner app. Test drives - Private test drives are arranged by appointment at an Aurelia Atelier. - For serious commissions, a multi-day "Extended Experience" drive can be arranged with a concierge. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]

- **Normal wear items**, including:
  - tyres
  - brake pads and discs
  - wiper blades
  - clutch friction surfaces

- **Damage caused by**:
  - accidents
  - misuse
  - track use
  - unauthorised modifications

- **Maintenance performed outside** the **Aurelia Authorised Service network**

If you’d like, I can also summarise what **is** covered under the standard Aurelia warranty.

- (upload) 05-ownership-faq: Aurelia Motors — Ownership Services & FAQ Aurelia Privilege membership - Every owner automatically receives Aurelia Privilege membership for the life of their ownership. - Benefits include 24/7 concierge, priority service booking, invitations to Aurelia driving events, and access to the owners' lounge at the Modena factory. Roadside assistance - Complimentary 24/7 roadside assistance is included for the duration of the warranty across the country and neighbouring regions. - If your car cannot be repaired the same day, Aurelia arranges alternative luxury transport so your plans are not interrupted. Charging the Aurelia Eterna - The Eterna supports 350 kW DC fast charging: roughly 10-80% in about 22 minutes under ideal conditions. - A home wall-box charger is included with every Eterna; professional installation can be arranged by Aurelia. - The car provides access to a network of premium public charging partners through the Aurelia Owner app. Test drives - Private test drives are arranged by appointment at an Aurelia Atelier. - For serious commissions, a multi-day "Extended Experience" drive can be arranged with a concierge. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. The Aurelia Owner app shows live build milestones and photos from the Atelier. - Q: Are Aurelia cars available outside Europe? A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.

- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

[User question]
One more thing — until when can I change my specification?

You may change your vehicle specification **up until the car enters the paint stage**. After that point, changes are no longer possible. *(Source: “Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery”)*

If you’d like, I can also help with the cancellation terms or arrange for your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor to assist with finalising the configuration.

- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
One more thing — are tyres covered under the warranty?

Tyres are **not covered under the warranty**. The knowledge base lists tyres among the **normal wear items** that are excluded from coverage, alongside brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces (**Warranty & Coverage**).

If you'd like, I can also outline what *is* covered under Aurelia's warranty.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

[User question]

You can change your specification **up until the car enters the paint stage**. After that point, changes are no longer possible. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
Good day. what is not covered by the warranty?

Good day. According to Aurelia Motors’ warranty information, the following are **not covered** under the warranty (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage):

- **Normal wear items**, including:
  - tyres
  - brake pads and discs
  - wiper blades
  - clutch friction surfaces

- **Damage caused by**:
  - accidents
  - misuse
  - track use
  - unauthorised modifications

- **Maintenance performed outside** the **Aurelia Authorised Service network**

If you would like, I can also summarise what **is** covered under the Aurelia warranty for you.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]

- You may add **up to 4 additional years of coverage**

- It also includes **24/7 roadside assistance** and **concierge transport**

For reference, the standard new vehicle warranty is **4 years / unlimited mileage** from the original delivery date.

If you’d like, I can also help you understand whether your vehicle is still within the eligibility window, or you may connect with your dedicated **Aurelia Client Advisor** to arrange Extended Care.

Could you tell me: is the Aurelia Eterna a good choice for me?

The Aurelia Eterna could be an excellent choice if what you want is a highly refined, all-electric flagship with strong performance and exceptional rear-seat comfort.

From the model overview, the Eterna offers:
- Dual-motor all-electric power with 700 hp
- Up to 620 km WLTP range
- 350 kW fast charging, with 10–80% in about 22 minutes
- A four-seat layout with reclining rear thrones and a glass roof
(Model Range)

It seems especially well suited if you value:
- Electric driving without compromising on performance
- Chauffeur-style luxury or elevated passenger comfort
- A flagship saloon experience rather than a sports car or SUV

You may want to consider one of the other Aurelia models instead if your priorities are different:
- For long-distance grand touring with 2+2 practicality: Aurelia Stellare
- For the most driver-focused open-top experience: Aurelia Vento
- For higher seating, five seats, and SUV versatility: Aurelia Soluna
(Model Range)

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

It allows owners to add **up to 4 additional years of coverage**, provided it is **activated before the original new vehicle warranty expires**. It also includes **24/7 roadside assistance** and **concierge transport**. (Source: **Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage**)

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

A few highlights from the model information:
- Dual-motor all-electric powertrain
- 700 hp
- 620 km WLTP range
- 350 kW fast charging, with 10–80% in about 22 minutes

How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
Are tyres covered under the warranty?

Tyres are **not covered** under the Aurelia new vehicle warranty, as they are listed under **normal wear items** that are excluded from coverage (02-warranty: *Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage*).

If you’d like, I can also summarise what **is** covered under the warranty.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
Excuse me, what is not covered by the warranty?

Certainly. According to Aurelia’s Warranty & Coverage policy, the following are **not covered** by the warranty:

- **Normal wear items**, including:
  - tyres
  - brake pads and discs
  - wiper blades
  - clutch friction surfaces
- **Damage caused by**:
  - accidents
  - misuse

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Can you clarify: is the Aurelia warranty transferable?

Yes. The new vehicle warranty is **fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost** (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage). Coverage begins **on the date of delivery to the first owner**.

If you’d like, I can also outline what remains covered after transfer and what exclusions still apply.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Tyres are **not covered under the standard warranty**.

According to Aurelia’s warranty terms, tyres are listed under **“normal wear items”**, alongside brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces, and these are **excluded from warranty coverage** (02-warranty).

[User question]
Please help: is the Aurelia Stellare a good choice for me?

The Aurelia Stellare is an excellent choice if you’re looking for a refined grand tourer above all else.

From the model overview, the Stellare is positioned as a Grand Tourer, with:
- a 4.0L twin-turbo V8
- 612 hp
- 0–100 km/h in 3.4 seconds
- 2+2 seating
- full-grain Tuscan leather as standard
- a focus on “long-distance touring in absolute comfort” (01-model-range)

So, the Stellare may suit you especially well if you want:
- effortless high performance with a traditional V8 character
- comfort for extended journeys
- occasional rear seating in a 2+2 layout
- a luxurious, hand-crafted interior

It may be less ideal if your priorities are different:
- If you want the most driver-focused, open-air experience, the Aurelia Vento is described as the sharper choice.
- If you need five seats and SUV practicality, the Aurelia Soluna would be more suitable.
- If you prefer fully electric motoring and flagship rear-seat luxury, the Aurelia Eterna would likely be the better fit. (01-model-range)

In short: if your ideal car is elegant, powerful, and designed for long-distance travel in comfort, the Stellare sounds very well matched to that brief.

If you’d like, I can also help you compare the Stellare with the Vento, Soluna, or Eterna based on your lifestyle.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

Could you tell me: is the Aurelia Vento a good choice for me?

The Aurelia Vento is an excellent choice if you’re looking for the most focused, engaging driving experience in the Aurelia range.

From the model information, the Vento is a roadster with:
- a 3.8L twin-turbo V8
- 580 hp
- a retractable hardtop that opens in 14 seconds
- two seats
- a lightweight carbon-fibre tub

It is described as “the most driver-focused car in the range” (Aurelia Motors — Model Range).

So, the Vento may suit you especially well if you want:
- a pure two-seat sports car
- open-top motoring
- a more intimate, performance-oriented experience
- a highly exclusive hand-built Aurelia

It may be less ideal if you need:
- extra passenger space, since it has only two seats
- a stronger emphasis on long-distance comfort, where the Stellare is positioned as the grand tourer
- SUV practicality, which would point more toward the Soluna
- an electric flagship experience, which would be the Eterna

As all Aurelia models are hand-built in Modena and available through the Aurelia Bespoke programme, the Vento also offers a very personal, tailored ownership experience.

If you’d like, I can also help you compare the Vento with the Stellare or Soluna to see which fits your lifestyle best.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

The corrosion warranty covers the body structure against perforation from corrosion for **12 years** (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage).

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. - (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- SUV practicality and all-wheel-drive terrain capability, where the Aurelia Soluna stands out

Excuse me, is the Aurelia Soluna a good choice for me?

The Aurelia Soluna is an excellent choice if you’re looking for a luxury SUV that blends performance, comfort, and versatility.

- adaptive air suspension for a more refined ride
- five seats, with an optional rear “Executive Lounge” package
- all-wheel drive with terrain modes

- a more elevated driving position than a grand tourer or saloon
- space for passengers and everyday practicality
- luxury comfort without giving up strong performance
- confidence in a wider range of road conditions

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Certainly. For the Aurelia Eterna, the battery warranty covers the high-voltage battery for **8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first** *(Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage)*.

It also includes a **capacity guarantee**: Aurelia warrants that the battery will retain at least **70% of its original usable capacity** during that warranty period. If it drops below that threshold, the battery is **repaired or replaced at no charge** *(Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage)*.

How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

[User question]
What can I customise with Aurelia Bespoke?

With Aurelia Bespoke, you can personalise several key elements of your vehicle:

- **Exterior paint**: choose from **over 200 colours**, or commission a **fully custom colour** matched to a sample you provide.
- **Interior materials**: select from **hand-stitched leather**, **sustainable wool**, **real wood veneers**, and **carbon-fibre veneers**.
- **Personalised detailing**: add **personalised embroidery**.
- **Commissioning plaque**: include a **unique plaque** with **your name or a personal inscription**.

If you’d like, I can also help outline the full bespoke ordering journey or connect you with an Aurelia Client Advisor to discuss a commission in more detail. *(Source: “Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery”)*

How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. [User question]
I'd like to know: is the Aurelia Eterna a good choice for me?

The **Aurelia Eterna** is an excellent choice if you’re looking for a **luxurious all-electric flagship saloon** with exceptional performance and comfort.

From the model overview, the Eterna offers:

- **Dual-motor all-electric powertrain**
- **700 hp**
- **620 km WLTP range**
- **350 kW fast charging**, with **10–80% in about 22 minutes**
- A highly indulgent cabin with **four seats**, **reclining rear thrones**, and a **glass roof**  
  *(Source: “Aurelia Motors — Model Range”)*

It may suit you especially well if you want:
- **Electric driving** without compromising on prestige or performance
- A **chauffeur-style or executive rear-seat experience**
- A refined grand saloon rather than a sports car or SUV

If, however, you need **five seats**, an SUV driving position, or more versatility, the **Aurelia Soluna** may be worth considering instead. If you prefer the most driver-focused open-top experience, the **Aurelia Vento** would be the more natural fit.

As every Aurelia is hand-built in Modena and personalised through the **Aurelia Bespoke** program, I’d be delighted to help you narrow the choice further. If you wish, I can also help compare the **Eterna** with the **Stellare** or **Soluna** based on how you plan to use the car.

A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Is the Aurelia Eterna a good choice for me?

- A grand touring 2+2 format, where the Aurelia Stellare is designed for long-distance touring

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 05-ownership-faq: Aurelia Motors — Ownership Services & FAQ Aurelia Privilege membership - Every owner automatically receives Aurelia Privilege membership for the life of their ownership. - Benefits include 24/7 concierge, priority service booking, invitations to Aurelia driving events, and access to the owners' lounge at the Modena factory. Charging the Aurelia Eterna - The Eterna supports 350 kW DC fast charging: roughly 10-80% in about 22 minutes under ideal conditions. - A home wall-box charger is included with every Eterna; professional installation can be arranged by Aurelia. - The car provides access to a network of premium public charging partners through the Aurelia Owner app. Test drives - Private test drives are arranged by appointment at an Aurelia Atelier. - For serious commissions, a multi-day "Extended Experience" drive can be arranged with a concierge. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. The Aurelia Owner app shows live build milestones and photos from the Atelier. - Q: Are Aurelia cars available outside Europe? A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
When does my warranty coverage start?

Your warranty coverage starts on the **date of delivery to the first owner**. This applies to the **New Vehicle Warranty**, which provides **4 years of unlimited-mileage coverage** (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage).

If you’d like, I can also outline what is covered and what is not under the warranty.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- **Damage resulting from**:
  - accidents

- (upload) 05-ownership-faq: Aurelia Motors — Ownership Services & FAQ Aurelia Privilege membership - Every owner automatically receives Aurelia Privilege membership for the life of their ownership. - Benefits include 24/7 concierge, priority service booking, invitations to Aurelia driving events, and access to the owners' lounge at the Modena factory. Roadside assistance - Complimentary 24/7 roadside assistance is included for the duration of the warranty across the country and neighbouring regions. - If your car cannot be repaired the same day, Aurelia arranges alternative luxury transport so your plans are not interrupted. Charging the Aurelia Eterna - The Eterna supports 350 kW DC fast charging: roughly 10-80% in about 22 minutes under ideal conditions. - A home wall-box charger is included with every Eterna; professional installation can be arranged by Aurelia. - The car provides access to a network of premium public charging partners through the Aurelia Owner app. Test drives - Private test drives are arranged by appointment at an Aurelia Atelier. - For serious commissions, a multi-day "Extended Experience" drive can be arranged with a concierge. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. The Aurelia Owner app shows live build milestones and photos from the Atelier. - Q: Are Aurelia cars available outside Europe? A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.
