- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.

How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. - (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

Yes — you can cancel and receive a refund, depending on the production stage of your vehicle.

- The commissioning deposit is **fully refundable if you cancel before production begins**.
- **Once production starts, the deposit becomes non-refundable**.
- If you would like to make changes instead of cancelling, **specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage**.

If you'd like, I can also help you understand what stage your order would need to be at, or connect you with your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor for assistance with the cancellation process.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
Excuse me, how long is the corrosion warranty?

The corrosion warranty covers the **body structure against perforation from corrosion for 12 years**. (Source: **Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage**)

If you’d like, I can also outline the rest of the paint and body coverage for your Aurelia.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
Can you clarify: what is not covered by the warranty?

Certainly. According to Aurelia Motors’ Warranty & Coverage policy, the warranty does **not** cover the following (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage):

- **Normal wear items**, including:
  - tyres
  - brake pads and discs
  - wiper blades
  - clutch friction surfaces

- **Damage caused by**:
  - accidents
  - misuse
  - track use
  - unauthorised modifications

- **Maintenance performed outside** the **Aurelia Authorised Service network**

If you would like, I can also summarise what *is* covered under the Aurelia new vehicle warranty and battery warranty.

Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. The Aurelia Owner app shows live build milestones and photos from the Atelier. - Q: Are Aurelia cars available outside Europe? A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
Could you tell me: are tyres covered under the warranty?

Tyres are not covered under the Aurelia new vehicle warranty, as they are listed under normal wear items that are excluded from coverage (02-warranty).

For reference, the same exclusion also applies to brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces.

If you'd like, I can also outline what is covered under the warranty or help you understand whether a specific tyre-related issue might fall outside normal wear.

- 700 hp
- 620 km WLTP range

- Very high performance in a more elegant saloon format

- For long-distance touring in a 2+2 grand tourer: Aurelia Stellare
- For the most driver-focused open-top experience: Aurelia Vento
- For greater versatility and five-seat SUV practicality: Aurelia Soluna

- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
What does the battery warranty cover?

For the Aurelia Eterna, the battery warranty covers the high-voltage battery for **8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first**. Aurelia also guarantees that the battery will retain **at least 70% of its original usable capacity** during that period. If it falls below that threshold within warranty, the battery will be **repaired or replaced at no charge**. *(Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage)*

If you’d like, I can also summarise the full vehicle warranty and what is not covered.

Quick question — is the Aurelia Eterna a good choice for me?

The Aurelia Eterna could be an excellent choice if you’re looking for a refined, high-performance electric flagship with a strong focus on rear-seat luxury and long-range usability (01-model-range).

A few highlights:
- Dual-motor all-electric powertrain with 700 hp
- 620 km WLTP range
- 350 kW fast charging, with 10–80% in about 22 minutes
- Four-seat layout with reclining rear thrones and a glass roof

- A fully electric Aurelia

- Exclusive ownership, as all Aurelia models are limited production

- More versatile family seating, the Soluna offers five seats

- A grand touring coupe feel with 2+2 seating, the Stellare may be worth considering

If you’d like, I can also help you compare the Eterna with the Stellare, Vento, or Soluna based on your lifestyle.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. The Aurelia Owner app shows live build milestones and photos from the Atelier. - Q: Are Aurelia cars available outside Europe? A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

[User question]
Good day. are tyres covered under the warranty?

Good day. Tyres are **not covered** under the Aurelia new vehicle warranty, as they are classified as **normal wear items** (Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage).

For reference, the knowledge base lists these as not covered:
- **Tyres**
- Brake pads and discs
- Wiper blades
- Clutch friction surfaces

Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. - (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care includes 24/7 roadside assistance and concierge transport.

Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. - (upload) 05-ownership-faq: Aurelia Motors — Ownership Services & FAQ Aurelia Privilege membership - Every owner automatically receives Aurelia Privilege membership for the life of their ownership. - Benefits include 24/7 concierge, priority service booking, invitations to Aurelia driving events, and access to the owners' lounge at the Modena factory. Roadside assistance - Complimentary 24/7 roadside assistance is included for the duration of the warranty across the country and neighbouring regions. - If your car cannot be repaired the same day, Aurelia arranges alternative luxury transport so your plans are not interrupted. Charging the Aurelia Eterna - The Eterna supports 350 kW DC fast charging: roughly 10-80% in about 22 minutes under ideal conditions. - A home wall-box charger is included with every Eterna; professional installation can be arranged by Aurelia. - The car provides access to a network of premium public charging partners through the Aurelia Owner app. Test drives - Private test drives are arranged by appointment at an Aurelia Atelier. - For serious commissions, a multi-day "Extended Experience" drive can be arranged with a concierge. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build progress? A: Yes. The Aurelia Owner app shows live build milestones and photos from the Atelier. - Q: Are Aurelia cars available outside Europe? A: Aurelia delivers worldwide through its Atelier partners; lead times vary by region. - Q: Do you offer financing? A: Tailored financing and leasing are available through Aurelia Financial Services; speak with your Client Advisor for options. For anything not covered here, an Aurelia Client Advisor is available 24/7 through the concierge line.

- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

The **Aurelia Care Plan** is a **prepaid maintenance plan** that covers **all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km**, whichever comes first. It is **transferable with the car**, and it can be **purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership**. *(Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance)*
